_comment: Edit this file to add, remove, or tune sources. The fetch script reads it on every run. A broken or missing feed logs a warning and is skipped, it never stops the whole pull. type controls how the script handles each entry.

rss_sources.name: GenomeWeb
rss_sources.note: Industry trade outlet. Safety net that covers all spatial players (MI, Navinci, 10x, etc.) even if their own feeds are dead. Category left blank so the scorer assigns it per item.

rss_sources.name: Business Wire (Genetics)
rss_sources.note: Business Wire Genetics topic feed. Keyword-filtered to spatial/ISH terms. Catches MI, 10x, Akoya, Standard BioTools, etc. that publish here.

rss_sources.name: Business Wire (Oncology)
rss_sources.note: Business Wire Oncology topic feed. Keyword-filtered. Catches TME/cancer spatial launches.

rss_sources.name: PR Newswire (All)
rss_sources.note: PR Newswire main feed. Keyword-filtered. Catches 10x Genomics and others publishing via PRN. URL may need confirming.

rss_sources.name: 10x Genomics Newsroom
rss_sources.note: Likely dead (10x uses PR Newswire). Kept in case; newswire net is the real catch.

rss_sources.name: Bruker News
rss_sources.note: IR feed, may work. CosMx/GeoMx via NanoString under Bruker.

rss_sources.name: Navinci News
rss_sources.note: WordPress feed, may work. Naveni proximity ligation.

rss_sources.name: Akoya Biosciences
rss_sources.note: Likely dead; Akoya now under Quanterix (acquired 2025), publishes via GlobeNewswire.

pubmed.name: PubMed
pubmed.query: (spatial transcriptomics[Title/Abstract] OR "in situ hybridization"[Title/Abstract] OR RNAscope[Title/Abstract] OR "spatial biology"[Title/Abstract] OR MERFISH[Title/Abstract] OR smFISH[Title/Abstract] OR "hybridization chain reaction"[Title/Abstract] OR BaseScope[Title/Abstract] OR "multiplexed imaging"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("last 120 days"[EDAT])
pubmed.note: No API key needed at low volume. Register a free NCBI key later to raise the rate limit if you add more queries.

nih_reporter.name: NIH RePORTER
nih_reporter.advanced_text_search: spatial transcriptomics in situ hybridization RNAscope smFISH HCR multiplexed imaging spatial proteomics BaseScope miRNAscope single molecule FISH spatial biology tissue RNA localization
nih_reporter.note: Highest-value sales signal. No auth. Respect 1 request/second. Names PI and institution for territory targeting. Method-term OR anchor mirrors the SciLeads playbook structure; persona-level relevance is handled by the scorer.

nsf_awards.name: NSF Awards
nsf_awards.note: Funds spatial method development NIH misses (BIO directorate, neuro, plant). No auth. Names PI and institution for territory targeting. NOTE: NSF keyword is a phrase match, so a single anchor term is used; scoring filters relevance downstream.

mi_news.name: Molecular Instruments
mi_news.note: MI site is Wix with no working RSS. Scrapes the news page HTML and links to the Business Wire / PR Newswire article for each release. Most direct RNAscope competitor, treat as high urgency.
